rows.metric_definition: reported successful solves divided by benchmark challenge count in the source baseline
rows.data_use_constraints: offline benchmark artifact use only; no live service automation
rows.comparability_assumptions: Mechanism-level mapping from Halligan dice matching to local Dice_Count; metric is a binary success-rate style baseline but dataset parity is not exact.

rows.data_use_constraints: offline benchmark artifact use only; no live service automation
rows.comparability_assumptions: Mechanism-different external smoke row for coverage; useful as larger-benchmark context but not direct local task parity.
